prestazioni: 4G63T MIVEC (2.0L inline-4) forged internals: Manley 87mm forged crankshaft, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and JE 87mm forged pistons (8.8:1 compression) with ACL Race Series main and rod bearings for 400+ whp reliability on E85

Turbocharger upgrade: Garrett GTX3582R Gen II with a 0.82 A/R turbine housing, billet compressor wheel, and TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegate (set to 32 psi peak boost with a 3-port MAC solenoid for spool optimization)

Fuel system: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors, Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup with -8AN lines, and a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump paired with a Tomei high-flow fuel rail and Aeromotive FPR for E85 compatibility
estetica: Voltex Type-7 rear wing with carbon fiber endplates and 3D-printed adjustable mounts for 200+ lbs of downforce at 120 mph (specific to Evo IX rear hatch aerodynamics)
Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with custom front canards (CFRP) and rear overfenders (polyurethane) to clear 275/35/18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires on Volk Racing TE37V 18x10.5 +25 wheels

Custom carbon fiber front splitter (Seibon) with integrated air curtains and a 3D-printed ABS undertray for 15% reduced front-end lift, paired with a Cusco rear diffuser and side skirts for balanced aero
